exploration_log.aha_moment: Each built-in strategy already sets `Name = XxxConstants.DefaultName` in its constructor. Adding `StrategyType = XxxConstants.DefaultName` alongside `Name` is the natural pattern. The telemetry source constructor just needs an optional 4th parameter.
exploration_log.hindsight: Confirming that all built-in strategy options follow the same `Name = XConstants.DefaultName` pattern meant I could make the change uniformly.

alternatives: Add StrategyType as non-optional constructor param to ResilienceTelemetrySource (breaking)
Add as optional param with default null (backward compatible)
key_decisions.decision: Add StrategyType as optional parameter (default null) to ResilienceTelemetrySource constructor
key_decisions.reasoning: There are existing callers (the composite pipeline source) that construct ResilienceTelemetrySource without StrategyType; making it optional avoids breaking those call sites.

solve_notes: Added `StrategyType` property to `ResilienceStrategyOptions` and `ResilienceTelemetrySource`. Updated `ResiliencePipelineBuilderBase.CreateComponent` to pass `entry.Options.StrategyType` as an optional 4th parameter to `ResilienceTelemetrySource`. Updated constructors of `RetryStrategyOptions`, `CircuitBreakerStrategyOptions`, `FallbackStrategyOptions`, `HedgingStrategyOptions`, and `TimeoutStrategyOptions` to set `StrategyType` to their respective `DefaultName` constants alongside `Name`.
task_text:
Fix ResilienceTelemetrySource missing a dedicated StrategyType field

`ResilienceTelemetrySource` exposes `StrategyName` (the
user-configurable `ResilienceStrategyOptions.Name`) but provides no
separate field for the immutable strategy type identifier (e.g.
`"Retry"`, `"CircuitBreaker"`, `"Timeout"`). When users override the
default `Name` with a custom value, the strategy type is lost from
telemetry events and listeners have no way to filter or aggregate
events by strategy type independently of the assigned name. Fix
`ResilienceTelemetrySource.cs` to add a `StrategyType` property, and
update `ResiliencePipelineBuilderBase.CreateComponent` to populate it
from a new `ResilienceStrategyOptions.StrategyType` property that each
built-in strategy sets to its well-known type name constant (e.g.
`RetryConstants.DefaultName`).

tier_difference_reasoning: The minimum set covers the infrastructure changes. The thrash_preventing set adds the per-strategy options files that also need to be updated — without these, an AI agent would need to discover and update each built-in strategy's constructor separately, risking incomplete coverage.
